name: Colon Cancer Synoptic Report
description: Synoptic pathology report template for colon cancer

findings.technique: Segmental colectomy / polypectomy specimen submitted for pathological examination. Specimen received fresh and inked.
findings.comparison: Clinical history: [carcinoma of colon / polyp removal]. Prior colonoscopy: [finding]. Pre-operative imaging: [CT/MRI] staging.

sections.name: Specimen Type
sections.content: Specimen type: [Right hemicolectomy / Left hemicolectomy / Sigmoidectomy / Low anterior resection / Polypectomy]

sections.name: Tumor Type
sections.content: Histologic type: [Adenocarcinoma / Mucinous adenocarcinoma / Signet ring cell carcinoma / other]. Grade: [Well / Moderately / Poorly / Undifferentiated] differentiated.

sections.name: Tumor Size
sections.content: Tumor size: [X]cm (greatest dimension). [Tumor is centered at / polyp base involved by] carcinoma.

sections.name: Tumor Invasion
sections.content: Depth of invasion: [pT1 / pT2 / pT3 / pT4a / pT4b]. [Muscularis propria: involved/not involved]. [Serosa: involved/not involved]. [Adjacent organ: involved/not involved].

sections.name: Margins
sections.content: Proximal margin: [uninvolved by carcinoma / involved]. Distal margin: [uninvolved by carcinoma / involved]. Circumferential margin: [uninvolved (>1mm) / involved].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Lymph nodes: [X] examined, [X] positive for metastasis. [Pericolic / Perirectal / Intermediate] nodes. [Highest metastatic node: level X].

sections.name: Lymphovascular/Perineural Invasion
sections.content: Lymphovascular invasion: [Present / Absent]. Perineural invasion: [Present / Absent].

sections.name: MSI Testing
sections.content: Microsatellite instability (MSI) status: [MSS (microsatellite stable) / MSI-H (high) / MSI-L (low)]. MLH1: [retained/lost]. MSH2: [retained/lost]. MSH6: [retained/lost]. PMS2: [retained/lost].

impression:
1. [Histologic type], [Grade], [pT stage], measuring [X]cm
2. Margins: [status]
3. Lymph nodes: [X] positive out of [X] examined
4. Lymphovascular invasion: [Present/Absent]. Perineural invasion: [Present/Absent]
5. MSI status: [X]
6. [AJCC stage: pT[X] pN[X] M[X]]
author: RadReport Templates
